<Project>
  <!-- Define properties for benchmark project. -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(MSBuildProjectFile)' == '$BENCHMARK_PROJ$'">

  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Define properties for BenchmarkDotNet.Autogenerated.csproj. -->
  <PropertyGroup Condition="'$(MSBuildProjectFile)' == '$AUTOGENERATED_PROJ$'">
    <OutputPath>$OUTPUT_PATH$</OutputPath>
    <PublishDir>$PUBLISH_DIR$</PublishDir>

    <!-- Suppress error NETSDK1085: The 'NoBuild' property was set to true but the 'Build' target was invoked. That occurred when running `dotnet publish` command. -->
    <BuildProjectReferences Condition="'$(NoBuild)' == 'true'">false</BuildProjectReferences>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <!-- Custom targets for benchmark project. -->
  <Target Name="BdnDumpReferenceCopyLocalPaths"
    DependsOnTargets="ResolveReferences"
    AfterTargets="BdnFilterPackageAssets"
    Condition="'$(MSBuildProjectFile)' == '$BENCHMARK_PROJ$'"
    Returns="@(ReferenceCopyLocalPaths)">
  </Target>

</Project>
